description: Export blocks. If < range > is not supplied, all blocks will be exported.

6.0.description: Export blocks. If <range> is not supplied, all blocks will be exported.

keywords.name: to-file
keywords.description: Export the blocks to a file named s.

keywords.name: to-set
keywords.description: Export the blocks to a building block set named s. If the optional <offset v> is supplied, all coordinates will be shifted by that vector in the destination set.

keywords.name: to-geometry-set
keywords.description: Export the blocks to a geometric set named s. It only creates “external” faces of the supplied blocks as a set of polygons (quads or triangles).
